title: Zerodha Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)

jsonLd.title: Zerodha Advisory Limited is Hiring: Credit Analyst (Junior)
jsonLd.description:
Grow your career with Zerodha Advisory Limited! We are hiring a Credit Analyst for our Indore team. Be part of a workplace that celebrates innovation, diversity, and performance.

About Zerodha Advisory Limited:
Zerodha Advisory Limited is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Prepare annual reports and investor presentations
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis
• Develop financial models and projections for business planning
• Prepare MIS reports for senior management review
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Risk Management
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in QuickBooks
• Proficiency in Income Tax
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Tally
• Proficiency in Python for Finance

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Work-from-home flexibility
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Indore, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Zerodha Advisory Limited!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
